title.en: ARRANGEMENT OF SIGNALLING OR LIGHTING DEVICES, THE MOUNTING OR SUPPORTING THEREOF OR CIRCUITS THEREFOR, FOR VEHICLES IN GENERAL
Arrangement of optical signalling or lighting devices, the mounting or supporting thereof or circuits therefor (for lighting vehicle interior B60Q3/00)
{Devices preventing the lights from becoming dirty or damaged, e.g. protection grids or cleaning by air flow (windshield wipers for cleaning optical devices of vehicles B60S1/04)}
{with light guides for distributing the light between several lighting or signalling devices}
{Devices integrating an element dedicated to another function}
{Spatial arrangement}
{with provision for maintenance, e.g. changing the light bulb (swivel arrangements  B60Q1/0425)}
{Switches therefor (B60Q1/1446, B60Q1/343, B60Q1/40 take precedence)}
{Details of electrical connections (B60Q1/305 takes precedence; electrical connection of the light source itself F21S41/192, F21S43/195)}
the devices being primarily intended to illuminate the way ahead or to illuminate other areas of way or environments
the devices being primarily intended to indicate the vehicle, or parts thereof, or to give signals, to other traffic
Arrangement of lighting devices for vehicle interiors; Lighting devices specially adapted for vehicle interiors
for dashboards
for lighting specific fittings of passenger or driving compartments; mounted on specific fittings of passenger or driving compartments (lighting for dashboards B60Q3/10)
for compartments other than passenger or driving compartments, e.g. luggage or engine compartments
specially adapted for specific vehicle types
Mounting arrangements (for compartments other than passenger or driving compartments B60Q3/30; specially adapted for specific vehicle types B60Q3/40)
characterised by optical aspects
characterised by the purpose
Circuits; Control arrangements (for dashboards B60Q3/16; for mass transit vehicles B60Q3/47)
Arrangement or adaptation of acoustic signal devices
{Switches therefor}
{automatically actuated}
Arrangement or adaptation of portable emergency signal devices on vehicles
{Devices without lamps}
to be attached to overhanging loads or extending parts of vehicle
Arrangement or adaptation of signal devices not provided for in one of main groups B60Q1/00 - B60Q7/00 {, e.g. haptic signalling}
{Alarm devices when the motor is stopped and the lights are on}
{for parking purposes, e.g. for warning the driver that his vehicle has contacted or is about to contact an obstacle (warning arrangements in garages E04H6/42)}
{for anti-collision purposes}
Arrangement of monitoring devices for devices provided for in groups B60Q1/00 - B60Q9/00
{Emergency driving lights in the event of failure of the principal lighting circuit}
{for lighting devices, e.g. indicating if lamps are burning or not}
Special features or arrangements of vehicle headlamps
Special arrangements for adjusting headlamps, e.g. means for transmitting the movements for adjusting the lamps
Indexing codes for automatically adjustable headlamps or automatically dimmable headlamps
Special features for controlling or switching of the light beam
Indexing codes relating to particular vehicle conditions
Indexing codes relating to the driver or the passengers
Indexing codes relating to the vehicle environment
Indexing codes relating to other road users or special conditions
Special features or arrangements of exterior signal lamps for vehicles
Electro- or photo- luminescent surfaces, e.g. signalling by way of electroluminescent strips or panels
Multi-color single source or LED matrix, e.g. yellow blinker and red brake lamp generated by single lamp
Daytime running lights [DRL], e.g. circuits or arrangements therefor
Welcome lights, i.e. specific or existing exterior lamps to assist leaving or approaching the vehicle
Projected symbol or information, e.g. onto the road or car body
Special features or arrangements of vehicle interior lamps
associated with air conditioning arrangements
Arrangements for illuminating different zones in the vehicle, e.g. front/rear, different seats
Features related to particular types of vehicles not otherwise provided for
Autonomous vehicles
Utility vehicles, e.g. for agriculture, construction work
Mass transport vehicles
Features of lamps not covered by other groups in B60Q
Retrofit arrangements
Arrangements for easy recycling, e.g. for easy dismantling or use of special materials
Lamps commanded by wireless transmissions
Several lamps activated in sequence, e.g. sweep effect, progressive activation
Arrangements to reconfigure features of lighting or signalling devices, or to choose from a list of pre-defined settings
